mapper.sql: SELECT STD.USER_ID , NVL(( -- 중간고사 시험 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON AA.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.USER_ID = RSLT.USER_ID AND RSLT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE 1=1 AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_EXAM_MID', 'EXAM_MID_TEAM') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND TK.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) + NVL(( -- 중간고사 대체퀴즈 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON AA.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.USER_ID = RSLT.USER_ID AND RSLT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE 1=1 AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_MID') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND TK.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) + NVL(( -- 중간고사 대체과제 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SBM ON AA.ASMT_ID = SBM.ASMT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL EVL ON SBM.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = EVL.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND EVL.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.ASMT_GBNCD = 'MID_EXAM_SBST_ASMT' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND SBM.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) AS MID_NO_EVL_CNT , NVL(( -- 기말고사 미평가 -- 기말고사 시험 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON AA.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.USER_ID = RSLT.USER_ID AND RSLT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_LST', 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST', 'EXAM_LST_TEAM') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND TK.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) + NVL(( -- 기말고사 대체퀴즈 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON AA.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.USER_ID = RSLT.USER_ID AND RSLT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ_SBST_EXAM_LST') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND TK.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) + NVL(( -- 기말고사 대체과제 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SBM ON AA.ASMT_ID = SBM.ASMT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL EVL ON SBM.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = EVL.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND EVL.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.ASMT_GBNCD = 'LST_EXAM_SBST_ASMT' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND SBM.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ),0) AS LAST_NO_EVL_CNT , ( -- 세미나 미평가 -- SELECT COUNT(1) -- FROM TB_LMS_SMNR AA -- JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WK -- ON AA.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = WK.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID -- WHERE WK.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID 0 -- -> 컬럼 변경 작업 전으로 우선 0 처리 ) AS SMNR_NO_EVL_CNT , ( -- 과제 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SBM ON AA.ASMT_ID = SBM.ASMT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL EVL ON SBM.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = EVL.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND EVL.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.ASMT_GBNCD IN ('ASMT', 'ASMT_TEAM', 'PRCTC_ASMT', 'PRCTC_ASMT_TEAM', 'INDV_ASMT') AND EVL.EVLYN = 'N' AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND SBM.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID )AS ASMT_NO_EVL_CNT , ( -- 토론 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP PT ON AA.DSCS_ID = PT.DSCS_ID AND PT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND PT.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ) AS DSCS_NO_EVL_CNT , (-- 퀴즈 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON AA.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK ON DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID = TK.EXAM_DTL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RSLT ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RSLT.TKEXAM_ID AND TK.USER_ID = RSLT.USER_ID AND RSLT.EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.EXAM_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND AA.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND TK.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ) AS QUIZ_NO_EVL_CNT , ( -- 설문 미평가 SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY AA JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WK ON AA.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = WK.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PT ON AA.SRVY_ID = PT.SRVY_ID AND PT.SRVY_PTCP_EVLYN = 'N' WHERE AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND AA.SRVY_QSTNS_CMPTNYN = 'Y' AND WK.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND PT.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID ) AS SRVY_NO_EVL_CNT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD WHERE 1=1 AND STD.SBJCT_ID = 'SBJCT_OFRNG_ID2' AND STD.ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM IS NULL AND STD.AUDITYN = 'N'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID: stdMrkListCntSelect 설 명 : 학생 성적 목록 수를 가져온다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT A ON STD.USER_ID = A.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT_DTL B ON (A.MRK_SBJCT_ID = A.MRK_SBJCT_ID) JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_ITM_STNG C ON (A.SBJCT_ID = C.SBJCT_ID AND B.MRK_ITM_TYCD = C.MRK_ITM_TYCD) JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON (STD.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND STD.ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM IS NOT NULL AND STD.AUDITYN = 'N' AND STD.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} GROUP BY A.USER_ID, C.SBJCT_ID ) A

/* SQL ID: markSubjectDAO.invalidMrkRfltrtSumQuizSelect 설 명 : 해당 과목의 퀴즈 성적반영비율의 합이 100%인지 여부를 체크한다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON AA.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR ON (SBJ.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT') WHERE 1=1 AND AA.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND AA.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) WHERE SUM_MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR SUM_MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID: markSubjectDAO.invalidMrkRfltrtSumAsmtSelect 설 명 : 해당 과목의 과제 성적반영비율의 합이 100%인지 여부를 체크한다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_ASMT AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON AA.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR ON (SBJ.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT') WHERE 1=1 AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) WHERE SUM_MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR SUM_MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID: markSubjectDAO.invalidMrkRfltrtSumDscsSelect 설 명 : 해당 과목의 토론 성적반영비율의 합이 100%인지 여부를 체크한다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_DSCS AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON AA.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR ON (SBJ.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT') WHERE 1=1 AND AA.DELYN ='N' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) WHERE SUM_MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR SUM_MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID: markSubjectDAO.invalidMrkRfltrtSumSmnrSelect 설 명 : 해당 과목의 세미나 성적반영비율의 합이 100%인지 여부를 체크한다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT -- SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT 100 AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT /*컬럼 변경 작업 전으로 우선 100점 처리*/ FROM TB_LMS_SMNR AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON AA.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR ON (SBJ.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT') WHERE 1=1 AND AA.DELYN ='N' ) WHERE SUM_MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR SUM_MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID: markSubjectDAO.invalidMrkRfltrtSumSrvySelect 설 명 : 해당 과목의 설문 성적반영비율의 합이 100%인지 여부를 체크한다. */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT SUM(NVL(AA.MRK_RFLTRT, 0)) AS SUM_MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_SRVY AA JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON AA.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SMSTR_CHRT SMSTR ON (SBJ.SMSTR_CHRT_ID = SMSTR.SMSTR_CHRT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_REF_TYCD = 'CHRT') WHERE 1=1 AND AA.DELYN = 'N' AND AA.USEYN = 'Y' AND AA.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' ) WHERE SUM_MRK_RFLTRT IS NULL OR SUM_MRK_RFLTRT != 100

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.examScoreList 설 명 : 학습자들의 중간or기말고사 평가점수를 조회한다. */ WITH /*-- [과목 수강생 전체와 시험 기본정보 매핑]*/ BASE_INFO_LIST AS ( SELECT B.SBJCT_ID , B.EXAM_BSC_ID , B.MRK_RFLTRT , A.USER_ID , B.EXAM_GBNCD FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID
AND B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID', 'QUIZ_EXAM_MID', 'EXAM_MID_TEAM')
AND B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_LST', 'QUIZ_EXAM_LST', 'EXAM_LST_TEAM')
AND B.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND B.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE 1=1 AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' AND A.ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM IS NULL ), /* -- [일반/재시험 점수 및 패널티 계산]*/ NORMAL_SCORE AS ( SELECT TK.USER_ID , DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID /*-- 미채점인경우 -1*/ , CASE WHEN RS.EVLYN = 'Y' THEN RS.TOT_SCR ELSE -1 END AS SCORE , CASE WHEN (TK.RETKEXAM_YN = 'Y' AND DTL.REEXAMYN = 'Y') THEN (DTL.REEXAM_MRK_RFLTRT / 100) ELSE 1 END AS PENALTY FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RS ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RS.TKEXAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON TK.EXAM_DTL_ID = DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID AND NOT EXISTS( -- 결시자 제외 (중복방지) SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABS WHERE ABS.EXAM_BSC_ID = DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND ABS.USER_ID = TK.USER_ID AND ABS.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' ) ), /*--[결시자 확인 및 대체과제/시험 체크]*/ SUBSTITUTE_SCORE AS ( SELECT ABS.USER_ID , ABS.EXAM_BSC_ID AS TARGET_BSC_ID /*-- 대체 퀴즈/과제 중 점수 있는 것을 선택 AND 미채점인 경우 -1*/ , CASE WHEN (SB_QUIZ_RS.TKEXAM_ID IS NOT NULL AND SB_QUIZ_RS.EVLYN = 'N') OR (SB_ASMT_RS.ASMT_SBMSN_ID IS NOT NULL AND SB_ASMT_RS.EVLYN = 'N') THEN -1 ELSE COALESCE(SB_QUIZ_RS.TOT_SCR, SB_ASMT_RS.SCR, 0) END AS SUB_SCORE , (ABS.ABSNCE_RFLTRT / 100) AS ABS_PENALTY FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_ABSNCE ABS JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_EVL_SBST SBST ON ABS.EXAM_BSC_ID = SBST.EXAM_BSC_ID /*-- [경로 A: 대체 퀴즈 점수 조인]*/ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL SB_QUIZ ON SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = SB_QUIZ.EXAM_BSC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM SB_QUIZ_TK ON SB_QUIZ.EXAM_DTL_ID = SB_QUIZ_TK.EXAM_DTL_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT SB_QUIZ_RS ON SB_QUIZ_TK.TKEXAM_ID = SB_QUIZ_RS.TKEXAM_ID AND ABS.USER_ID = SB_QUIZ_RS.USER_ID /*-- [경로 B: 대체 과제 점수 조인]*/ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT SB_ASMT ON SBST.EXAM_SBST_ID = SB_ASMT.ASMT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SB_ASMT_TK ON SB_ASMT.ASMT_ID = SB_ASMT_TK.ASMT_ID AND ABS.USER_ID = SB_ASMT_TK.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL SB_ASMT_RS ON SB_ASMT_TK.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = SB_ASMT_RS.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE ABS.APLY_STSCD = 'APRV' ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID /*-- 최종 원점수(일반/재시험 점수 OR 결시 대체 점수)*/ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 OR MIN(NVL(C.SUB_SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(COALESCE(B.SCORE * B.PENALTY, C.SUB_SCORE * C.ABS_PENALTY, 0)) END AS RAW_SCORE /*-- 성적 반영 비율 계산 최종점수 (최종 원점수 * 반영비율)*/ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 OR MIN(NVL(C.SUB_SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(COALESCE(B.SCORE * B.PENALTY, C.SUB_SCORE * C.ABS_PENALTY, 0 ) * (A.MRK_RFLTRT / 100)) END AS FINAL_SCORE FROM BASE_INFO_LIST A /*-- 일반/재시험 점수 매칭*/ JOIN NORMAL_SCORE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID /*-- 결시 대체 점수 매칭*/ LEFT JOIN SUBSTITUTE_SCORE C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND A.EXAM_BSC_ID = C.TARGET_BSC_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID
/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.stdMrkSbjctList 설 명 : 해당 과목에 수강하는 사용자 아이디를 가져온다. */ SELECT USER_ID , SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND ATNDLC_CNCL_DTTM IS NULL AND AUDITYN = 'N'

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.stdAttdSummaryByWeekSelect 설 명 : 해당 과목 강의 컨텐츠가 있는 주차 수, 학생이 수강완료한 주차 수, 자각한 주차 수를 조회한다.. */ WITH STD_INFO AS ( /*학생*/ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.SBJCT_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_USER B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' ), LESSON_CONTS AS ( /*강의컨텐츠가 있는 주차 정보*/ SELECT WK.SBJCT_ID , WK.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID , WK.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WK WHERE WK.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND WK.DELYN = 'N' AND ( WK.LCTR_TYCD = 'LCTR' /*강의 컨텐츠*/ OR EXISTS ( /*비디오컨텐츠*/ SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_LCTR LC JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_CONTS CON ON LC.LCTR_ID = CON.LCTR_ID WHERE LC.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = WK.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND ( CON.LCTR_CONTS_TYCD = 'VDO' OR CON.CONTS_URL IS NOT NULL) ) ) ORDER BY LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO ASC ) /*강의컨텐츠가 있는 주차 수, 완료한 주차 수, 지각한 주차 수*/ SELECT A.USER_ID , COUNT(A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID) AS LCTR_SCHDL_CNT , NVL( SUM(CASE WHEN A.LRN_STSCD = 'CMPTN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) , 0)AS COMPLETE_CNT , NVL( SUM(CASE WHEN A.LRN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) , 0)AS LATE_CNT FROM ( /*주별 학습자 학습상태*/ SELECT STD.USER_ID , CON.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID , CON.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO , STS.LRN_STSCD FROM STD_INFO STD CROSS JOIN LESSON_CONTS CON LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_BYWKNO_USER_LRN_STS STS ON STD.USER_ID = STS.USER_ID AND CON.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = STS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ) A GROUP BY A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.smnrEvlScoreList 설 명 : 학습자들의 세미나 평가점수를 조회한다. */ SELECT SBJ.SBJCT_ID , STD.USER_ID , 100 AS RAW_SCORE /* 세미나 작업 전이라 임시로 100점 넣어둠 */ , 100 AS FINAL_SCORE FROM TB_LMS_SMNR SMNR JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON SMNR.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID AND SBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD ON SBJ.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND SMNR.DELYN = 'N' AND SMNR.ATNDC_PROCYN = 'Y' GROUP BY SBJ.SBJCT_ID, STD.USER_ID ORDER BY SBJ.SBJCT_ID, STD.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.asmtEvlScoreList 설 명 : 학습자들의 과제 평가점수를 조회한다. */ WITH /* 과목 수강생 + 기준과제(부모)정보 */ BASE_INFO_LIST AS ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.ASMT_ID AS BASE_ASMT_ID /*기준 과제 ID*/ , A.USER_ID , B.MRK_RFLTRT /*반영비율*/ FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.UP_ASMT_ID IS NULL /*최상위 과제만 선택*/ AND B.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND B.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND B.ASMT_GBNCD IN ('ASMT', 'ASMT_TEAM', 'PRCTC_ASMT', 'PRCTC_ASMT_TEAM') AND B.DELYN = 'N' ), /* 과제 제출 및 평가점수 추출(최신건 기준) */ ASMT_SCORE AS ( SELECT ASMT.SBJCT_ID /*팀과제면 부모 ID, 개인과제면 자기자신ID를 기준ID로 설정*/ , NVL(ASMT.UP_ASMT_ID, ASMT.ASMT_ID) AS BASE_ASMT_ID , SBM.USER_ID , CASE WHEN EVL.EVLYN = 'Y' THEN EVL.SCR ELSE -1 END AS SCORE /* 팀과제의 경우 부모ID에서 재시험반영비율 가져옴 */ , CASE WHEN SBM.RESBMSNYN = 'Y' THEN ( CASE WHEN ASMT.UP_ASMT_ID IS NULL THEN (ASMT.RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT / 100) ELSE (NVL(UP.RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT, ASMT.RESBMSN_MRK_RFLTRT) / 100) END ) ELSE 1 END AS PENALTY FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY A.ASMT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN , A.ASMT_ID , A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.USER_ID , A.RESBMSNYN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A ) SBM JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT ASMT ON SBM.ASMT_ID = ASMT.ASMT_ID /*부모 정보 조인용*/ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT UP ON ASMT.UP_ASMT_ID = UP.ASMT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMT_EVL EVL ON SBM.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = EVL.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE SBM.RN = 1 ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID /*-- 하나라도 미채점(-1)이 있으면 전체 -1, 아니면 합산*/ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE,0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0) * B.PENALTY) END AS RAW_SCORE /* 반영비율이 계산된 최종 점수*/ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0) * B.PENALTY * (A.MRK_RFLTRT / 100)) END AS FINAL_SCORE FROM BASE_INFO_LIST A JOIN ASMT_SCORE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.BASE_ASMT_ID = B.BASE_ASMT_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.dscsEvlScoreList 설 명 : 학습자들의 토론 평가점수를 조회한다. */ WITH BASE_INFO_LIST AS ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.DSCS_ID AS BASE_DSCS_ID /*기준 토론 ID*/ , B.MRK_RFLTRT , A.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.UP_DSCS_ID IS NULL /*최상위 토론만 선택*/ AND B.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND B.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND B.DELYN = 'N' ), DSCS_SCORE AS ( SELECT DSCS.DSCS_ID /*팀토론이면 부모ID, 일반토론이면 자기자신ID를 기준ID로 설정*/ , NVL(DSCS.UP_DSCS_ID, DSCS.DSCS_ID) AS BASE_DSCS_ID , PTCT.USER_ID , CASE WHEN PTCT.EVLYN = 'Y' THEN PTCT.SCR ELSE -1 END AS SCORE FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP PTCT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS DSCS ON PTCT.DSCS_ID = DSCS.DSCS_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS UP ON DSCS.UP_DSCS_ID = UP.DSCS_ID ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) END AS RAW_SCORE , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0) * A.MRK_RFLTRT / 100) END AS FINAL_SCORE FROM BASE_INFO_LIST A JOIN DSCS_SCORE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.BASE_DSCS_ID = B.BASE_DSCS_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.quizEvlScoreList 설 명 : 학습자들의 퀴즈 평가점수를 조회한다. */ WITH BASE_INFO_LIST AS ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.EXAM_BSC_ID , A.USER_ID , B.MRK_RFLTRT FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND B.EXAM_TYCD = 'QUIZ' AND B.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ', 'QUIZ_TEAM') AND B.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND B.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' ), QUIZ_SCORE AS ( SELECT TK.USER_ID , DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID /*미채점인 경우 -1*/ , CASE WHEN RS.EVLYN = 'Y' THEN RS.TOT_SCR ELSE -1 END AS SCORE , CASE WHEN (TK.RETKEXAM_YN = 'Y' AND DTL.REEXAMYN = 'Y') THEN (DTL.REEXAM_MRK_RFLTRT / 100) ELSE 1 END AS PENALTY FROM TB_LMS_TKEXAM TK JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_RSLT RS ON TK.TKEXAM_ID = RS.TKEXAM_ID JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL DTL ON TK.EXAM_DTL_ID = DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID /*최종 원점수(일반/재시험 점수)*/ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE,0) * B.PENALTY) END AS RAW_SCORE /* 성적반영비율 계산 최종점수 */ , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE,0) * B.PENALTY * (A.MRK_RFLTRT / 100)) END AS FINAL_SCORE FROM BASE_INFO_LIST A JOIN QUIZ_SCORE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.EXAM_BSC_ID = B.EXAM_BSC_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.srvyScoreEvlList 설 명 : 학습자들의 설문 평가점수를 조회한다. */ WITH BASE_INFO_LIST AS ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , B.SRVY_ID AS BASE_SRVY_ID , B.MRK_RFLTRT , A.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID AND B.SBJCT_ID ='' AND B.UP_SRVY_ID IS NULL /*최상위 설문만 선택*/ AND B.MRK_RFLTYN = 'Y' AND B.MRK_RFLTRT > 0 AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' ), SRVY_SCORE AS ( SELECT SRVY.SRVY_ID /*팀설문이면 부모ID, 일반설문이면 자기자신ID를 기준ID로 설정*/ , NVL(SRVY.UP_SRVY_ID, SRVY.SRVY_ID ) AS BASE_SRVY_ID , PTCP.USER_ID , CASE WHEN PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_EVLYN = 'Y' THEN PTCP.PTCP_EVL_SCR ELSE -1 END AS SCORE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY ON PTCP.SRVY_ID = PTCP.SRVY_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY UP ON SRVY.UP_SRVY_ID = UP.SRVY_ID ) SELECT A.SBJCT_ID , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) END AS RAW_SCORE , CASE WHEN MIN(NVL(B.SCORE, 0)) = -1 THEN -1 ELSE SUM(NVL(B.SCORE, 0) * A.MRK_RFLTRT / 100) END AS FINAL_SCORE FROM BASE_INFO_LIST A JOIN SRVY_SCORE B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.BASE_SRVY_ID = B.BASE_SRVY_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID ORDER BY A.SBJCT_ID, A.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : markSubjectDAO.adtnScoreList 설 명 : 학생들의 가산점을 조회한다. (이의신청 승인 후 얻은 점수) */ SELECT USER_ID , OBJCT_APLY_SCR FROM TB_LMS_MRK_OBJCT_APLY WHERE SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} AND OBJCT_APLY_STSCD = 'APRV'
